cold_refreshment.label: Cold Refreshment
cold_refreshment.tagline: Ice cream, cold brew, sparkling — demand climbs as heat departs above normal.
cold_refreshment.creative_angle: Lean into the heat: "Beat the {temp_f}° spike." Push chilled, on-the-go, impulse occasions. Day-part toward afternoon peak.

warm_comfort.label: Warm Comfort
warm_comfort.tagline: Soup, hot drinks, comfort food — demand rises when it turns colder than normal.
warm_comfort.creative_angle: Sell warmth and comfort: "When it turns, we're ready." Evening and weekend dwell-time occasions, cozy at-home messaging.
